title: Former Scotland rugby union captain Stuart Hogg stripped of MBE after domestic abuse conviction
description: It comes more than a year after the ex-Glasgow Warriors star pleaded guilty to a single charge of domestic abuse involving his then estranged wife.
content:
Former Scotland rugby union captain Stuart Hogg has been stripped of his MBE, according to an official notice in The Gazette.

title: Surrey doctor with 'special interest in penises' jailed
description: Timothy Girling, of West Molesey, has been jailed for six years for sexually assaulting patients.
content:
A sexual health doctor who abused male patients in a "gross betrayal" of their trust has been jailed for six years.
Dr Timothy Girling, 55, from West Molesey in Surrey, sexually assaulted and performed sex acts on patients under the guise of examinin... [1246 chars]

title: Shabana Mahmood accused of mimicking Trump as she announces asylum plans
description: Home secretary’s proposals to overhaul immigration system include end to permanent refugee status
content:
Shabana Mahmood has put herself on a collision course with Labour MPs after announcing a set of changes to the immigration system that one backbencher said mimicked Donald Trump and another claimed would lead to a Windrush-style scandal.

title: T20 World Cup: India reach final despite Jacob Bethell century for England
description: Jacob Bethell's thrilling century is not enough as India pip England by just seven runs to seal a spot in the T20 World Cup final.
content:
Jacob Bethell's thrilling century was not enough as India pipped England by just seven runs to seal a spot in the T20 World Cup final in a high-scoring thriller in Mumbai.

title: US asked Ukraine for help fighting Iranian drones, Zelensky says
description: Ukraine's president says Kyiv will only help if doing so does not deplete its own air defences.
content:
The US has asked Ukraine for help defending Gulf allies against Iranian drones, according to President Volodymyr Zelensky.
He said Ukraine's partners had been reaching out and there had been "requests from the American side".
